course.title: Raven Cargo Agentic AI Engineering
course.subtitle: Raven 2-day student portal
course.summary: Student portal for the Raven March training course with the exact live class order, course pages, labs, submissions, resources, challenges, and async follow-through.

blocks.title: Block 1 · The Agentic Coding Paradigm
blocks.summary: Build the Raven mental model for where agents fit, what to automate first, and how PRAO turns freight workflows into structured agent work.

blocks.title: Block 2 · Claude Code Foundations
blocks.summary: Configure RavenEye context, permissions, and codebase conventions so the team can ship real changes instead of watching demos.

blocks.title: Block 3 · Prompt Engineering Depth
blocks.summary: Apply TCEF prompts to freight documents with confidence-aware extraction, validation rules, and reusable prompt assets.

blocks.title: Block 4 · Agent Thinking
blocks.summary: Read traces, interpret tool plans, and steer multi-source carrier analysis without over-guiding the agent.

closeout.title: Day 1 Close
closeout.summary: Map today’s patterns to Raven workflows, ship a PR, and prep the MCP / skills work for Day 2.

blocks.title: Block 5 · Skills & Commands
blocks.summary: Package repeated freight workflows into reusable skill files and slash commands that persist after the live cohort ends.

blocks.title: Block 6 · MCP Architecture + Building Servers
blocks.summary: Wire Raven operational data into Claude through Tools, Resources, and Prompts, then turn that understanding into a deployable server surface.

blocks.title: Block 7 · Multi-Agent Systems
blocks.summary: Coordinate monitoring, notification, routing, and compliance agents as a system instead of isolated prompts.

blocks.title: Block 8 · Security + Capstone Build
blocks.summary: Apply human-gated controls, secret management, and production deployment thinking to the Raven capstone pipeline.

closeout.title: Day 2 Close
closeout.summary: Share capstone pipelines, hand off next-step build work, and move the cohort into the async runway.

useCases.title: Shipment Detail Extraction from Emails
useCases.description: Parse carrier and customer emails to extract shipment details, dates, and special requirements as structured output.

useCases.title: Carrier Communication Classification
useCases.description: Classify carrier messages by urgency and type so Raven can route work into the right operational queue.

useCases.title: Exception Report Summarization
useCases.description: Turn weekly delay, detention, claims, and missed pickup reports into standup-ready operational summaries.

useCases.title: RavenEye Codebase Configuration
useCases.description: Configure CLAUDE.md, permissions, and project conventions so RavenEye work can ship as real pull requests.

useCases.title: RavenEye PR Review Automation
useCases.description: Use agent-assisted review to check Zod validation, /api/v2 conventions, and security constraints on every RavenEye PR.

useCases.title: BOL Data Extraction Pipeline
useCases.description: Extract shipper, consignee, commodity, weight, piece count, PRO number, and SCAC from Bills of Lading with validation.

useCases.title: Rate Quote Extraction from Carrier Sheets
useCases.description: Capture lane codes, accessorials, minimum weight, and effective dates from carrier rate sheets and emails.

useCases.title: Carrier Intelligence Scoring
useCases.description: Read FMCSA SAFER data, claims history, and lane performance to pre-score carriers in seconds.

useCases.title: FMCSA Carrier Authority Verification
useCases.description: Verify MC and USDOT authority, insurance status, and safety rating against FMCSA SAFER through a tool call.

useCases.title: Live Shipment GPS Tracking via MCP
useCases.description: Expose read-only shipment position and status from RavenEye tracking feeds as addressable context.

useCases.title: Exception Report via MCP Prompt
useCases.description: Package a reusable delay-report template that aggregates operational context and returns a structured exception brief.

useCases.title: Build RavenEye MCP Server
useCases.description: Build the Raven operational server surface with schemas, error handling, and production deployment guardrails.

useCases.title: Freight Operational Skills Library
useCases.description: Author reusable operational skills such as carrier scoring and BOL extraction so workflows persist after the live delivery.

useCases.title: Delay Detection & Auto-Notification
useCases.description: Monitor tracking feeds, notify customers, and trigger contingency routing as a coordinated multi-agent sequence.

useCases.title: Compliance Verification Pipeline
useCases.description: Parallelize authority, insurance, and hazmat checks and then merge them into a human-reviewable compliance package.

useCases.title: HUMAN GATE Approval Pattern
useCases.description: Require human approval for rebooking, carrier updates, rate changes, and any public or financially binding action.

useCases.title: Agent Secrets & Permission Audit
useCases.description: Audit RavenEye-connected agents for API key handling, permissions scope, and operating cost at production scale.

useCases.title: Carrier Intelligence Pipeline Capstone
useCases.description: Design the trigger, context, decision logic, action scope, and output delivery for the exportable Raven production pipeline.
